commands.review_summary:
The PR changes the skills runtime watcher to use native recursive `fs.watch` for existing skill roots on macOS/Windows, keep chokidar elsewhere and on fallback, and adds focused watcher lifecycle tests.

PR surface: Source +247, Tests +256. Total +503 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-backed: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/issues/90578 gives deterministic macOS `lsof` steps, and current main still admits `SKILL.md` into the chokidar watcher path. I did not run the macOS reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Needs maintainer review and target-platform proof rather than an automated code repair; the remaining blocker is evidence for macOS/Windows behavior.
